svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 20px; margin-left: 3px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #111827;
display: inline-block; font-size: 28px; font-family: Arial; color: light-dark(#111827, #d4dae7); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #4b5563;
display: inline-block; font-size: 16px; font-family: Arial; color: light-dark(#4b5563, #9da6b2); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;
